assertion_results.text: Tasks target both 'trustify-backend' and 'trustify-ui' repositories with at least one task per repo
assertion_results.evidence: Tasks 1-3 have Repository: trustify-backend. Tasks 4-6 have Repository: trustify-ui. Both repos are targeted with 3 tasks each.

assertion_results.text: Backend tasks have lower task numbers than the frontend tasks that depend on them
assertion_results.evidence: Backend tasks are numbered 1, 2, 3. Frontend tasks are numbered 4, 5, 6. Task 4 (frontend) depends on Task 3 (backend). All backend task numbers are strictly lower than all frontend task numbers.

assertion_results.text: UI-facing frontend tasks (pages, components) reference Figma design context mentioning specific PatternFly components and visual specifications — API-layer frontend tasks (API types, client functions, hooks) are exempt from this requirement
assertion_results.evidence: Task 4 (API types, client function, React Query hook) is API-layer and exempt. Task 5 (SbomComparePage) extensively references Figma: PatternFly Select (single, typeahead), ExpandableSection, Badge with colors (green/red/blue/yellow), Table (composable, sortable), EmptyState with CodeBranchIcon, Skeleton loading, Dropdown for export, SeverityBadge. Task 6 (SbomListPage compare action) references PatternFly Table with isSelectable row behavior.

assertion_results.text: Cross-repo dependency ordering is enforced: either at least one frontend task explicitly depends on a backend task in its Dependencies section, or all tasks target a shared feature branch where backend tasks have lower task numbers than frontend tasks (implicit ordering via feature-branch workflow)
assertion_results.evidence: Task 4 (frontend, trustify-ui) explicitly states: 'Depends on: Task 3 — Add SBOM comparison endpoint and integration tests (backend endpoint must exist)'. This is a direct cross-repo dependency from a frontend task to a backend task.

assertion_results.text: Frontend tasks reference paths from repo-frontend.md; backend tasks reference paths from repo-backend.md
assertion_results.evidence: Backend tasks reference paths from repo-backend.md: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs, tests/api/sbom.rs, common/src/error.rs, entity/src/sbom_package.rs, entity/src/sbom_advisory.rs. Frontend tasks reference paths from repo-frontend.md: src/api/models.ts, src/api/rest.ts, src/api/client.ts, src/hooks/useSboms.ts, src/hooks/useSbomById.ts, src/pages/SbomListPage/SbomListPage.tsx, src/routes.tsx, src/components/SeverityBadge.tsx, src/components/FilterToolbar.tsx, tests/mocks/handlers.ts.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence:
Task 1: '## Repository
trustify-backend'. Task 2: '## Repository
trustify-backend'. Task 3: '## Repository
trustify-backend'. Task 4: '## Repository
trustify-ui'. Task 5: '## Repository
trustify-ui'. Task 6: '## Repository
trustify-ui'. Each has exactly one repository name.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections as required by the handoff contract in task-description-template.md
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 tasks contain: '## Target Branch' (all set to 'main'), '## Description' (substantive descriptions), '## Acceptance Criteria' (with checkbox items), '## Test Requirements' (with checkbox items). Verified in task-1 through task-6 files.

assertion_results.text: File paths in Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths from the corresponding mock repository structure manifests (repo-backend.md or repo-frontend.md), not invented paths
assertion_results.evidence: All modified files exist in the manifests: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs, tests/api/sbom.rs (backend); src/api/models.ts, src/api/rest.ts, src/routes.tsx, tests/mocks/handlers.ts, tests/mocks/fixtures/sboms.json, src/pages/SbomListPage/SbomListPage.tsx (frontend). New files are created in directories that exist in the manifests: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/comparison.rs (model/ dir exists), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/compare.rs (endpoints/ dir exists), src/hooks/useSbomComparison.ts (hooks/ dir exists), src/pages/SbomComparePage/ (pages/ dir exists with same structure pattern).

assertion_results.text: Implementation Notes in every non-bookend task reference specific file paths and code patterns from the repository, not abstract or generic guidance — bookend tasks (create-branch, merge-branch) are exempt as they omit Implementation Notes by design
assertion_results.evidence: No bookend tasks present. All 6 tasks have Implementation Notes with specific file paths and code patterns: Task 1 references modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/summary.rs, details.rs, serde attributes. Task 2 references modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs, sbom_package entity, package entity, HashMaps, AppError::NotFound. Task 3 references modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/get.rs, list.rs, mod.rs, Query extractor, CompareParams struct pattern. Task 4 references src/api/rest.ts::fetchSboms(), src/api/client.ts, src/hooks/useSboms.ts, useSbomById.ts. Task 5 references src/components/SeverityBadge.tsx, src/pages/SbomDetailPage/, src/routes.tsx, PatternFly component mapping. Task 6 references SbomListPage.tsx, src/components/FilterToolbar.tsx, PatternFly Table isSelectable, useNavigate.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Target Branch section — either all set to 'main' (direct-to-main workflow) or bookend tasks set to 'main' with intermediate tasks set to the feature issue ID (feature-branch workflow)
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 tasks have '## Target Branch\nmain'. The impact map confirms 'Mode: direct-to-main'. Consistent workflow: all tasks target main.

assertion_results.text: After each task is created, a description digest comment is posted with a real computed SHA-256 hash — exactly 64 lowercase hex characters, not a placeholder (<hex-digest>, <hex>), abbreviated value, or example string. Marker format: '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256:<64-char-hex>'
assertion_results.evidence: No output file contains any '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256:' marker or any SHA-256 hash. The outputs consist only of task description markdown files (task-1 through task-6) and an impact-map.md. No digest comments are present anywhere in the output files.

assertion_results.text: Convention-aware enrichment validates file-type applicability per shared/convention-applicability-rules.md before including a convention — inapplicable conventions are excluded entirely (not listed with 'Not applicable' annotations), and applicable ones include a rationale in the prescribed format ('Applies: task modifies <file> matching the convention's <scope>'), not free-form prose
assertion_results.evidence: No output file contains any reference to CONVENTIONS.md, any 'Per CONVENTIONS.md' lines, any 'Applies:' rationale lines, or any convention enrichment whatsoever. Convention-aware enrichment was not performed in any of the 6 task descriptions. The convention-applicability-rules.md requires applicable conventions to include rationale in prescribed format, but no conventions appear in any Implementation Notes section.
